texto: Each person has a self-image that, to some degree, does not match reality. A significant difference between self-image and reality can be harmful. The more self-aware you are, the less likely you are to be vulnerable to your illusions. The more aware you are, the more you can do with your life.
explicacao: Citação de Robert H. Bolton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Each person has a self-image that, to some degree, does not match reality.
